rationale: This benchmark task checks if the AI agent correctly identifies a complete nested subsection, including all its child elements and a mention of its title within a code block, and moves it to a new parent section while leaving a similarly named decoy subsection untouched.
task_description: Move the complete subsection titled "## System Configuration" from the "## Setup" section to the "## Maintenance" section. The subsection to be moved includes all its child elements and a mention of its title inside a fenced code block. Leave the subsection titled "## System Configuration" within the "## Maintenance" section untouched. Provide the full edited Markdown document.
input_markdown:
# Server Installation Guide

## Setup

### Prerequisites
- Java Runtime Environment (JRE) 1.8 or later
- At least 4 GB RAM

### Database Setup
```sql
CREATE DATABASE mydb;
USE mydb;
```

## System Configuration

Enable the following services:
- File sharing
- Remote access

```bash
# Ensure that the system configuration is correct
sudo systemctl enable sshd
sudo systemctl start sshd
```

## Maintenance

### Backup Procedures
Perform regular backups of the following directories:
- /var/log
- /etc

## System Configuration

Run the following command to update the system:
git pull origin main

```bash
# Check the current system configuration
./check_config.sh
```
expected_markdown:
# Server Installation Guide

## Setup

### Prerequisites
- Java Runtime Environment (JRE) 1.8 or later
- At least 4 GB RAM

### Database Setup
```sql
CREATE DATABASE mydb;
USE mydb;
```

## Maintenance

### Backup Procedures
Perform regular backups of the following directories:
- /var/log
- /etc

## System Configuration

Enable the following services:
- File sharing
- Remote access

```bash
# Ensure that the system configuration is correct
sudo systemctl enable sshd
sudo systemctl start sshd
```

## System Configuration

Run the following command to update the system:
git pull origin main

```bash
# Check the current system configuration
./check_config.sh
```
